home.name: How to Use Genuivo AI Assistant
home.description: Get started with Genuivo, the AI assistant that responds with rich, interactive UI instead of plain text.

steps.name: Ask a Question
steps.text: Type your question in the chat. Ask about restaurants, travel, events, or anything else.

steps.name: Get Interactive Answers
steps.text: Genuivo responds with maps, lists, cards, and structured layouts tailored to your question.

steps.name: Provide Details When Asked
steps.text: If the AI needs more context, it shows input fields to gather your preferences in one step.

steps.name: Explore Results
steps.text: Browse the visual answers, tap map pins, follow links, and act on the structured information.

webApp.description: Genuivo is an AI assistant that responds with rich, interactive UI. Ask anything and get maps, lists, links, and structured answers you can act on.
features: Interactive AI answers with maps, lists, and cards
Live web search for real-time data
